reviews.comment:
Baños limpios, personal muy predispuesto para calentar el agua para el mate. El único problema el comedor estaba cerrado de noche y al regreso por ser feriado.

(Translated by Google)
Clean bathrooms, staff very helpful in heating water for mate. The only problem was that the dining room was closed at night and on the way back because it was a holiday.
